name: Mineworx Technologies Ltd.
summary: Mineworx Technologies Ltd. engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties, and the development and deployment of extraction technologies in Spain and North America. The company owns 100% interest in Ceheg√É¬≠n Iron Ore project located in South-Eastern Spain. It also develops HM X-mill, a mineral grinding mill for grinding of ores, as well as regrinding of concentrates and tailings; HM X-leach, a cyanide-free process for the extraction of gold and other precious metals; and HM X-tract, a modular turnkey portable processing unit that includes crushing, grinding, sizing, gravity separation, floatation, concentration, clarification, water recycling, power generation, and operational service support modules. The company was formerly known as Iberian Minerals Ltd. and changed its name to Mineworx Technologies Ltd. in June 2017. Mineworx Technologies Ltd. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in St. Albert, Canada.
